_doc: The List (PLST) — bespoke recipe. The List is not a real sealed product; it's a rotating pool of reprints inserted (one at a time) into Set/Play Boosters. There's no official 'List booster', so this is a novelty 'open a slice of The List' pack: 15 cards spanning every rarity drawn from the PLST pool. `authoritative` offers only this one pack (the date heuristic would otherwise show play/draft/collector that don't exist). Approximate by nature.

draft.tagline: 15 cards pulled from The List — reprints spanning the whole game, every rarity · a novelty slice
